item.title: Refresh your pitch ✍️ • Lead with outcome 📈 • Name the lever ⚙️ • Give brief scope 🧠 • Close with value ✅ What part of your pitch feels weakest now? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
